Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
  2. Boundary

Uses of Interface
org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries.Boundary

Packages that use Boundary
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
Comprehensive boundary and region support for geometric modeling.
org.episteme.natural.earth
 
org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.

  • Uses of Boundary in org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries

    Subinterfaces of Boundary in org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Boundary2D
    Interface for two-dimensional boundaries (regions in a plane).
    interface 
    Boundary3D
    Interface for three-dimensional boundaries (volumes).
    Classes in org.episteme.core.mathematics.geometry.boundaries that implement Boundary
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CompositeBoundary<P>
    A composite boundary supporting inclusions (exclaves) and exclusions (enclaves).
    class 
    CompositeBoundary2D
    A composite 2D boundary supporting exclaves and enclaves.
    class 
    CompositeBoundary3D
    A composite 3D boundary supporting exclaves and enclaves.
    class 
    ConvexPolygon2D
    A convex polygon in 2D space.
    class 
    ConvexPolyhedron3D
    A convex polyhedron in 3D space.
    class 
    FuzzyBoundary2D
    A 2D boundary with fuzzy (graded) membership.
    class 
    PointBoundary<P>
    A zero-dimensional boundary representing a single point.

    Description

    Road

  • Uses of Boundary in org.episteme.social.geography

    Classes in org.episteme.social.geography that implement Boundary
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GeoPath
    Represents a geographical path, which can consist of multiple disjoint segments (MultiLineString).
    static class 
    GeoPath.SimpleGeoPath
    Inner class representing a single continuous path segment.
    class 
    GeoPolygon
    A geographical polygon supporting multiple disjoint regions (exclaves) and holes (enclaves).
    static class 
    GeoPolygon.SimpleGeoPolygon
    Inner class representing a simple polygon (1 exterior + N interiors).
